Interrupt Mask

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x34
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Masks interrupt generation from Port A to the interrupt controller. 0=interrupt unmasked (passes through), 1=interrupt masked (blocked).

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] intmask rw 0x0 INTMASK

Field Descriptions

intmask - INTMASK

0=unmasked, 1=masked
